text:
Market today: Tech is still the name of the game, but the broader market's choppy. Watch for any signs of rotation away from growth.

Your holdings: SOXL is bleeding at -35.68%, and SPAL is down hard too at -54.19%. These leveraged ETFs are brutal on margin. QQQI is also a trim candidate at -3.4%.

Watch: Keep an eye on SMH, still underwater at -7.23%. It's a key semiconductor ETF.

Bottom line: Manage the leveraged losers and stay focused on the tech sector's direction.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming further if it breaks below today's low, given the -35.68% loss and margin risk.
SPAL: Aggressively manage this position; the -54.19% loss is too deep on margin. Consider cutting losses if it weakens.
No new buys today - hold and watch
